turns.text: I'd be happy to help you with Flex Leagues! What would you like assistance with today?
Joining a Flex League
Great! Let me look up some information on joining a Flex League for you.

Here's how to join a Flex League:

1. Go to the Flex Leagues page on UTR Sports and use the filters to narrow your search by sport (Tennis or Pickleball), event type (upcoming, past, or custom dates), and location.

2. Click on a league name to learn more about it. When you find one you'd like to play in, click Register on the event page.

3. Select the division(s) you want to register for, then continue to payment.

4. If you're registering for a Doubles division, you'll need to Register as a Team. One partner registers both players and pays the full entry fee. Search for your partner's profile by name, or use the "+" button to invite them via email if you can't find them.

5. Make sure your partner accepts the invitation and creates a UTR Sports account — they'll appear on the registered players list once they do.

Once the league begins, you'll be paired with opponents and will be responsible for scheduling and completing matches over the league period. Completed matches count toward your rating, league standings, and possible playoff qualification.

You can find a Flex League near you at [universaltennis.com/flex-leagues](https://www.universaltennis.com/flex-leagues).

Does this resolve your question, or is there anything else I can help you with?
Why was i withdrawn from a tournament

here help with your tournament withdrawal. Let me gather a few details so I can investigate:

1. **Which tournament?** (event name, date, and location if you have it)
2. **Do you have a link to the event?** (e.g., https://app.utrsports.net/events/...)
3. **When did you notice the withdrawal?** (today, a few days ago, etc.)
4. **Did you request the withdrawal yourself, or was it unexpected?**

Once I have these details, I can help figure out what happened.
5/23 National Tennis Month Beach Series UTR Match Play, starting on May 23, 2026

Thanks for that info. A couple more quick questions:

1. **Did you request to withdraw from this tournament yourself**, or did you discover you were withdrawn unexpectedly?

2. **What's your email address** (the one associated with your UTR account)?

3. **Do you have the event link handy?** You can find it by searching for the event in the UTR app or on the web — it'll look like `https://app.utrsports.net/events/...`

These details will help me understand whether this was a system issue, a registration problem, or something else.
I did not request to be withdrawn, email address is [email]

Got it — that's concerning. An unexpected withdrawal needs investigation. Let me ask one more thing:

**What's your full name** (as it appears on your UTR profile)?

Once I have that, I'll escalate this to our support team so they can review why you were removed from the tournament and get you back in if appropriate.
Aseet Nadgouda

Perfect, thank you. One last thing before I escalate this:

**Do you have the event link?** (You can find it by searching "National Tennis Month Beach Series" in the UTR app or web — it'll start with `https://app.utrsports.net/events/`)

If you can't find it easily, that's okay — I can escalate without it, but it helps our team locate the exact tournament faster.
Hi Stewart - i cant see any of my results in my utr? my results are here - https://matchcentre.tennis.com.au/players/1125546/rubbers/doubles/2026

It looks like your Tennis Australia results aren't showing up on your UTR profile. Here's some helpful info:

**Your Tennis Australia ID needs to be linked to your UTR Sports profile** to activate your rating [location]. Your Tennis Australia ID is an **11-digit number starting with "66"** — you can find it on your Match Centre profile page under your name.

Once you have it, you can follow the steps to **activate your UTR rating [location]** here: [Activating your UTR rating [location]](https://support.universaltennis.com/en/support/solutions/articles/9000220026-activating-your-utr-rating-from-match-centre)

**Did this help resolve your issue?** If your Tennis Australia ID is already linked and results are still missing, I can escalate this to our support team for investigation. Just let me know! 🎾
its all connected but mot working
Got it — your Tennis Australia account is already linked but the results still aren't showing up. Let me look into this further.

1. **Your full name**
2. **Your email address** (the one linked to your UTR Sports account)
3. **Your UTR Sports profile link** (e.g., https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/XXXXXX)
4. **Approximately when were these results played?** (so I can check the timing)

Your support ticket has been submitted — your ticket number is **#843416**. Our team typically replies within four business days, working through requests in the order they're received. Thanks for your patience!

Is there anything else I can help you with, James? 🎾
